title: workspace-inventory.v1
description: Top-level inventory of a workspace directory, written by the workspace-inventory skill to .laguna/workspace-inventory.json. Records every top-level entry with its name, kind (file or directory), and recursive file count for directories, plus a total_files count. All counts and paths are mechanically checkable against the real filesystem tree.

schema_version.description: Contract identifier; always the literal string "workspace-inventory.v1".

total_files.description: Total number of regular files (not directories, not symlinks) in the workspace, recursively, excluding the .laguna/ directory itself.

entries.description: One record per top-level entry in the workspace root (excluding .laguna/). Sorted lexicographically by name.

name.description: Entry name (basename only, no path separators).

kind.description: Whether this entry is a regular file or a directory. Symlinks are not listed.

file_count.description: For directories: the total number of regular files contained recursively inside this directory. Omitted (or null) for file entries.
